repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.compiler: lexer and recursive-descent parser building an AST, intermediate representation, type checker, optimization pass preserving semantics, and code generation with a symbol table
set up a CI pipeline to deploy a static website to a CDN

retrieval_query: compiler lexer parser abstract syntax tree ast intermediate representation ir type checker optimization pass code generation symbol table semantics error recovery llvm

validation_smoke.name: code.compiler L3 validation smoke
signals: differential test: optimized vs unoptimized output match on a program corpus
type checker accepts well-typed and rejects ill-typed programs in the test suite
optimization pass verified semantics-preserving (IR verifier / equivalence checks)
error-recovery produces a useful diagnostic and continues parsing

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.compiler diagnosis smoke
signals: optimization pass that changes observable behavior (miscompilation)
parser that aborts on the first error instead of recovering
type rule that accepts an ill-typed program (unsoundness)
IR transformation violating an invariant the verifier should catch
symbol resolution ignoring scope or shadowing rules
